word: H3644 - כְּמֹו - kᵉmôw - kem-o' - According to

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּמו כּמו

Transliteration: kemô kâmô

Phonetic: kem-o'

BDB Definition:

  1. like, as, the like of which (adverb)
  2. when, according as, as it were (conjunction)

Origin: a form of the prefix "k-", but used separately [compare H3651]

TWOT entry: TWOT - 938

Part(s) of speech:
